chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4509 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.20481/2024 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Messrs. Ahmed Ali Hussain and Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed advocates for the petitioners Mr. Muhammad Taseer Khan, advocate for respondents No.2 & 3 along with Ms. Zainab Izhar, Assistant Collector, East. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Pursuant to last order, Ms. Zainab Izhar, Assistant Collector, East, is present. The learned officer states that the impugned recovery notice and the letter dated 25.06.2024 issued to Directorate General of Excise & Taxation regarding blocking of transaction, transfer etc. issued without adjudication shall be withdrawn, however, the department shall remain at liberty to issue show cause notice, if permissible under the law. In view of the foregoing the petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, the same is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
